# MediaDestination

**Object**

The user’s library or a playlist.

## Declaration

```swift
object MediaDestination
```

## Discussion

A playlist can be either a [doc://com.apple.sirikitcloudmedia/documentation/SiriKitCloudMedia/MediaItem] or a [doc://com.apple.sirikitcloudmedia/documentation/SiriKitCloudMedia/MediaDestination]. When the user adds a song to a playlist, the playlist is the [doc://com.apple.sirikitcloudmedia/documentation/SiriKitCloudMedia/MediaDestination]. When the user adds a playlist to their library, the playlist is a [doc://com.apple.sirikitcloudmedia/documentation/SiriKitCloudMedia/MediaItem], and the user’s library is the [doc://com.apple.sirikitcloudmedia/documentation/SiriKitCloudMedia/MediaDestination].

## Providing a Destination

- **AddMediaMediaDestinationResolutionResult.Success**: A media destination that successfully matches an intent.
- **MediaDestinationLibrary**: The user’s library as a destination for an add media intent.
- **MediaDestinationPlaylist**: A playlist as a destination for an add media intent.

## Inherited By

- MediaDestinationLibrary
- MediaDestinationPlaylist
